news.t: BlackRock launches ETF that expands beyond the 'Magnificent Seven'
Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
BlackRock Introduces Three iShares ETFs to Customize Exposure to U.S. Large Caps

holdings.infoBox: TOPT is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 16.68%, Apple at 14.06%, Alphabet at 6.99%, Alphabet at 5.60%, and Microsoft at 5.52%.

overview.description: The iShares Top 20 U.S. Stocks ETF (TOPT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Top 20 Select index. The fund seeks to mirror the performance of an index comprising the top 20 largest US firms by market-cap in the S&P 500. The companies are weighted by their float-adjusted market-cap TOPT was launched on Oct 23, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Blackrock's Jay Jacobs on AI infrastructure, megacaps and other ETF themes to watch in 2025
data.text: Jay Jacobs, head of U.S. BlackRock Thematic and Active ETFs, joins ‘Halftime Report' with CNBC's Bob Pisani to discuss the key themes to watch in the ETF space heading into 2025.

data.title: BlackRock launches ETF that expands beyond the 'Magnificent Seven'
data.text: BlackRock's iShares is targeting investors who want to diversify beyond from the "Magnificent Seven" megacap stocks.

data.text: “The shape of the U.S. equity market has undergone a massive change over just the last few years,” says BlackRock's Rachel Aguirre.
